banner.message: We detected your browser language is {browserLanguage}. Do you want to switch to {browserLanguage}?

agents.title: Agent Workspace
agents.subtitle: Inspect each agent's workspace status, file entry points, and connection progress.

viewMode.description: Patrol mode keeps only the hero image and role summary, while management mode restores the full controls.
viewMode.label: List mode

unreachable.title: Local API is currently unreachable
unreachable.description: The Agents page needs the local control-plane API before it can render. The frontend is up, but the backend endpoint is not responding, so the page is showing a recovery card instead.
unreachable.apiHint: Make sure this endpoint is reachable first, then reload the page.
unreachable.commandHint: If you are not running through Docker, these commands will start the local FastAPI service directly.

empty.title: No agents are available yet
empty.description: The local OpenClaw config has been loaded, but no agents are declared in `agents.list`, so this page currently shows an empty list.

firstLobster.ctaHint: Enter a name and choose an entry channel to automatically create the Feishu bot and finish the claim flow.
firstLobster.title: Claim the first lobster 🦞
firstLobster.description: Choose the channel you want to connect first. The default workspace and advanced options are ready in the background, and the default Feishu path will auto-create the bot for you.

hero.progressive: Expand extra settings only when needed

firstLobster.loading: Loading the default workspace bootstrap preview…

errors.previewFailed: Failed to load the default workspace preview. Please try again later.
errors.claimFailed: Failed to claim the lobster. Check the Feishu login session and try again.
errors.weixinQrFailed: Failed to get WeChat QR code. Please try again.
errors.weixinQrNotConfirmed: Please scan the QR code to authorize WeChat first.
errors.weixinCliMissing: The openclaw CLI was not found. Configure OPENCLAW_CLI_BIN for the server process, or make sure PATH includes /opt/homebrew/bin.
errors.weixinQrTimeout: Starting the WeChat QR login timed out. Please try again.
errors.pairingTextInvalid: A valid Feishu user id or Pairing code was not detected. Paste the full bot reply exactly as it appears.
errors.pairingConfirmFailed: Failed to finish pairing. Please try again.
errors.pairingCliMissing: No usable openclaw CLI is available in the current environment, so automatic pairing cannot finish yet.
errors.pairingAgentMissing: The current agent record is missing. Create it again and retry.
errors.openChatBlocked: The Feishu chat link is ready, but the browser blocked the new window. Allow pop-ups and try again.

weixin.idle: Click the button below to generate the claim QR code, then scan and confirm before claiming.
weixin.waitingHint: Use WeChat to scan the QR code below and start the authorization.
weixin.scannedHint: Continue the confirmation on your phone. Once confirmed, you can continue claiming.
weixin.confirmedHint: WeChat authorization is complete. You can now write the config and claim.
weixin.scanHint: Open WeChat → Scan → Scan this QR code to authorize
weixin.scanned: QR scanned. Please continue the confirmation on your phone.

workspace.title: Default workspace
workspace.unavailableHint: The default workspace directory is missing or not initialized yet. Run openclaw onboard first, then come back to claim the first lobster.
workspace.recommendedAgent: Recommended agent entry: {name} ({id}), reusing the default workspace.

files.title: Bootstrap files
files.previewUnavailable: No text preview is available for this file
files.noPreview: No text preview is available for this file.

channels.title: Extra channels
channels.description: Start with one channel by default. If you need multi-channel binding, add the extra channels here.

primary.title: Primary channel
primary.description: The primary channel defines the default runtime entry for the first agent. It is required when multiple channels are selected.
primary.empty: Select at least one channel first.

choose.title: Choose the first channel
choose.description: Decide where the first lobster should start working. In most cases one channel is enough and advanced bindings can wait.

name.title: Give it a name first
name.description: This name will be used for the Feishu app and first-run setup of {agentName}.
name.label: OpenClaw name
name.hint: Pick a name you can recognize instantly. You can change it later.

channel.title: Choose where it starts working
channel.description: Only Feishu and WeChat are shown here for now. Pick the entry channel first, then continue to create and claim.

pairingHello.title: Send “Hello” to it in Feishu
pairingHello.description: {agentName} has been created, but one final DM pairing step is still required.
pairingHello.body: Open the Feishu chat from the button below and send “Hello” to {agentName}. The bot will reply with a block of text containing your Feishu user id and a Pairing code. We will use that in the next step to finish the setup.

pairingPaste.title: Paste the bot reply back here
pairingPaste.description: Paste the full reply from Feishu exactly as it appears. The system will parse it automatically and finish the pairing.
pairingPaste.exampleBlock:
OpenClaw: access not configured.
Your Feishu user id: ou_e70e90b5d6a24092d32291815085f0a1
Pairing code: PXE6J2Z7
Ask the bot owner to approve with:
openclaw pairing approve feishu PXE6J2Z7
pairingPaste.label: Pairing text
pairingPaste.placeholder: Paste the entire bot reply here…
pairingPaste.hint: Do not split the fields manually. Just paste the original text.

credentials.title: Configure current channel: {channel}
credentials.description: You only need these credentials when doing a manual setup. When Feishu is selected, you can also try auto-create first.

claim.title: Create and claim in one click
claim.description: This will auto-create the Feishu OpenClaw bot first, then generate the SOUL.md, workspace structure, and first-run setup from the official default templates, and finish the claim for {agentName}.
claim.descriptionWeixin: After the WeChat QR authorization is confirmed, the default workspace config will be written directly and the claim for {agentName} will be completed.

advanced.title: Custom settings
advanced.description: Review manual credentials, extra channels, the default workspace, and bootstrap files.

credentials.title: Channel credentials
credentials.tip: Feishu uses appId/appSecret; Telegram uses botToken; Discord uses token.
credentials.empty: Credential fields will appear here after you select one or more channels.

autoCreate.title: Feishu auto-create
autoCreate.description: Reuse the local browser login session and create the bot through the Feishu OpenClaw quick-create page.
autoCreate.hint: Sign in to the Feishu Open Platform first. After success, appId / appSecret will be filled automatically and an instant chat entry will be provided.
autoCreate.completed: Feishu credentials have been filled automatically. Click “Write openclaw.json and claim” below to finish the claim.
autoCreate.completedCdp: Feishu credentials were filled by reusing the current Chrome session. Click “Write openclaw.json and claim” below to finish the claim.
autoCreate.appDescription: {agentName}, responsible for orchestrating the whole business

errors.feishuLoginRequired: Feishu login not detected. Sign in to the Feishu Open Platform and retry.
errors.autoCreateFailed: Failed to auto-create the Feishu app. Try again later.

actions.claim: Create and claim in one click
actions.waitingLogin: Waiting for and confirming Feishu sign-in…
actions.claimHint: The Feishu bot will be created automatically, then the current name, the official SOUL.md template, and the default workspace structure will be used to finish the claim for {agentName}.
actions.claimHintWeixin: After the WeChat QR authorization is confirmed, the current name and default workspace structure will be written to openclaw.json and the claim for {agentName} will be completed directly.
actions.waitingLoginHint: The Feishu sign-in page is open. Finish sign-in in the new browser window. If you already signed in, the system will actively revisit the OpenClaw page, confirm the session, and switch to “In progress” automatically.
actions.claimingHint: Feishu sign-in has been confirmed. The process is in progress: creating the bot, writing the config, and finishing the claim automatically.
actions.manualFallback: This channel still needs manual details. Expand the detailed settings to continue.
actions.defaultFlowOnlyFeishu: The current default generation flow supports Feishu first. One-click creation for other channels will be handled by the backend flow.

run.preparingDescription: The system is starting the Feishu automation flow and will open the Feishu page shortly.
run.waitingLoginTitle: Waiting for and confirming Feishu sign-in
run.waitingLoginDescription: Complete sign-in in the browser window that was just opened. If sign-in is already done, the system will proactively revisit the OpenClaw page, confirm the session, and then switch to “In progress” automatically.
run.claimingDescription: Feishu sign-in has been confirmed. The system is creating the bot, writing the config, and finishing the claim for {agentName}.
run.completedDescription: {agentName} has been created and claimed. Send “Hello” to it in Feishu next to finish the final DM pairing.

validation.primaryRequired: You must choose a primary channel when multiple channels are selected.
validation.fixFields: Complete the required channel credentials before submitting.
validation.workspaceUnavailable: The default workspace is not available yet, so the first agent cannot be claimed.

validation.sessionExpired: The session expired. Sign in again before claiming {agentName}.
validation.sessionPasswordChangeRequired: The account status changed. Update the password before claiming {agentName}.

header.title: Connect an OpenClaw local node
header.subtitle: Prepare a local node first, then connect it to the ClawPilot control plane. After that, workspace sync, file dispatching, and agent execution can attach to the local environment.

messages.nodeOnline: Node is online. Refreshing the page.

errors.copyFailed: Failed to copy {label}. Please copy it manually.

info.title: Fill node info
info.description: Enter a node name and the OpenClaw root path.

execute.title: Run the command
execute.description: Copy the command and execute it on the target machine.

wait.title: Wait for node online
wait.description: The page will poll status and refresh automatically.

cta.readyHint: Ready to generate a bootstrap command
cta.unavailableDesc: Resolve the current blockers first, then continue when bootstrap generation becomes available.
cta.generatingDesc: The system is creating the node and generating its command. It will switch to copy-ready automatically.
cta.readyDesc: Everything is ready. Click the button to generate an install command for this node.

agentSetup.promptEmpty: No bootstrap prompt is available yet.

issues.missingConfig: OpenClaw config file was not detected

summary.title: Connection summary

summary.noBlockers: No blockers detected. You can continue.

prompt.title: Bootstrap Prompt

prompt.notice: This prompt changes with environment state and is suitable for direct handoff to a local execution agent.

command.title: Current install command

command.descriptionUnavailable: The environment does not currently meet bootstrap generation requirements, so no command can be shown yet.

command.unavailable: No install command is available right now.

deleteDialog.descriptionPrefix: This will delete the entire directory in the current agent workspace
deleteDialog.descriptionSuffix: . All files and subfolders will be removed and cannot be recovered.

workspace.description: Browse the Skill directory on the left and preview or edit the current file on the right.

bootstrapError.title: Rescue Center API not ready
bootstrapError.description: The page could not load rescue bootstrap data. This usually does not mean the Codex CLI is missing. More often the backend on port 8088 has not loaded the latest rescue-center routes yet, or the endpoint is temporarily unreachable.

bootstrapError.routeMissing: The rescue-center backend routes are not loaded. Restart the backend on port 8088.
bootstrapError.backendUnavailable: The rescue-center backend is temporarily unavailable. Check that the service on port 8088 is running.

canvas.emptyDescription: Every thread stays locked to `~/.openclaw`. Create a rescue thread first, or send the first prompt directly from the dock below.

composer.placeholder: Send logs, deployment failures, or fix goals directly to the local Codex bridge…

notices.openclaw: This version syncs OpenClaw delivery config and template skeleton to .openclaw. Execution hooks will be wired in the next iteration.
notices.telegram: This version stores Telegram delivery config and template skeleton in the scheduled job model. Sending will be wired later.
notices.weixin: WeChat channel currently supports text-only delivery. Media messages will be supported in Phase 2.

logs.description: Runtime logs, troubleshooting traces, and execution output.
logs.label: Logs

root.description: Entry view for the full .openclaw root directory.
root.label: Root

currency.description: Switch cost display currency and review the USD/CNY rate source and timestamps.
currency.title: Currency and Exchange Rate

errors.updateGatewayFailed: Failed to save public access settings
errors.applyGatewayFailed: Failed to apply public access settings

gateway.title: Public Access
gateway.description: Keep a public IP + port as the backup entry. Saving will immediately apply the config, and adding a domain enables the primary HTTPS entry.
gateway.backupEntryDescription: Keep IP + port access available for bootstrap, debugging, and fallback.
gateway.primaryEntryDescription: Add a domain and the system will automatically enable HTTPS and use it as the primary entry.
gateway.sslEmailPrompt: This environment requires an SSL email. Enter the contact email for ACME registration:
gateway.sslEmailRequired: Enter an SSL email before continuing.

status.description: Customize display aliases for the four runtime states: working, idle, offline, and crashed. Leave blank to fall back to defaults.
status.title: Runtime Status Aliases

statusRules.crashed: Shown when the agent crashes or enters an error state.
statusRules.idle: Shown when the agent is online but currently has no task.
statusRules.offline: Shown when the agent is offline or disconnected.
statusRules.working: Shown when the agent is actively executing work.

systemSettings.subtitle: Manage system language, currency preference, runtime status aliases, and public access settings.
systemSettings.title: System Settings

prompts.receiptDefault: The task is approved. Please keep moving forward.
prompts.rejectDefault: Please revise according to the review and submit again.
prompts.submitSummaryDefault: Task completed and ready for review.

onboarding.agentPlaceholder: Enter the agent ID to onboard
onboarding.title: Onboarding Confirmation

header.title: Scheduled jobs management
header.subtitle: Review coverage, conflicts, and idle windows by agent. Compare timelines at multiple granularities and open jobs to edit.

filters.note: You are filtering by job cadence, not the timeline span.
filters.agentHint: Showing all agents when none are selected

states.emptyAgents: No agents to display for the current filters.

registryMissing.title: No scheduled jobs to manage yet
registryMissing.description: The environment hasn't loaded a scheduled jobs registry, usually because node onboarding or initialization isn't complete. Finish setup on the home page, then return for timeline and conflict analysis.
registryMissing.step1Title: 1. Go to the agent onboarding home
registryMissing.step1Description: Use the home page wizard to connect local nodes.
registryMissing.step2Description: Once nodes are online and the registry is generated, the timeline will appear here.

legend.title: All mode = overview heatmap
legend.scaleHint: Timeline scale adapts to the time window.

row.emptyOccurrences: No enabled job blocks in this window

editor.deliveryTargetEmpty: No explicit delivery target is configured yet.
editor.fixedTopicDisabled: This job is not using fixed-topic group mode
editor.blockEmpty: No block in the current window
